# Parry

> AI-powered reply suggestions for text messages

Parry is a mobile app that helps you respond to texts with AI-generated replies. Paste a message, pick a tone, get 3-5 crafted responses in seconds.

## Features
- 5 tones: Casual, Professional, Witty, Flirty, Direct
- Custom tone presets (Pro)
- Voice input with transcription
- Privacy-first: messages processed and immediately discarded
- Powered by Anthropic's Claude AI
- Free: 3 generations/day | Pro: unlimited ($9.99/mo)

## Links
- Website: https://parry.app
- Privacy Policy: https://parry.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://parry.app/terms
- Support: support@parry.app
